title: pilosella glaucescens subsp. tephrops
intro: Pilosella glaucescens subsp. tephrops, also known as a type of plant in the dandelion family, is a lesser-known but valuable herb that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella glaucescens subsp. tephrops include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Pilosella glaucescens subsp. tephrops can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
